TRANSF TO S22 ON 12/27/94 FOR FUR PTC AT 1030AM
CONT 12/15/94 AT 9AM IN S28 FOR PTC;CRT ORD DEFT BE BACK ON THAT DAY

CONT 12/9/94 AT 9AM IN S28 FOR PTC
DEFT CONT GTW;CONT 120894/1030/S22-PTC;122794/930/S22-TRIAL
CRT REFUSES ACCEPTS PLEA;CRT S/A PLEA G/ADM & REIN NG PLEAS & DEN ALLEGSTRANSF TO D22 AT 9AM FOR TO SET TRIAL ON 11/1/94
